rule: Alert me when cars are detected in the last 15 minutes
golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dt.track_id) FROM detection_tracks dt JOIN detection_classes dc ON dc.id = dt.detection_classes_id WHERE dc.app_config_id = 3 AND dc.name = 'car' AND dt.first_seen >= NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes'

rule: Notify me if any trucks appear in the past 45 minutes
golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dt.track_id) FROM detection_tracks dt JOIN detection_classes dc ON dc.id = dt.detection_classes_id WHERE dc.app_config_id = 3 AND dc.name = 'car' AND dt.first_seen >= NOW() - INTERVAL '45 minutes'
